sections.name: purchase-options
sections.layoutContract: same PDP purchase structure as Collatin; keep selected subscription state, one-time option, gift card review/rating pair, add-to-bag, benefit row, and expanded first accordion

sections.name: deep-content-sections
sections.purpose: preserve source section rhythm and full scroll depth with matched skeleton component rows

componentContracts.rule: preserve source order, child type, and repeated row count; suppress sticky/global chrome unless this row is the header component
preserve review carousel, active/ghost panes, badge, and quote block
preserve disclaimer, large yellow title panel, and scan media start
preserve scan continuation, carousel rhythm, copy block, and yellow next-section panel

anatomy: comparison-card-pair with two dense comparison-card children
each card preserves media, title, labels, separators, and at least four detail rows
componentContracts.rule: preserve comparison card count, content density, and source card chrome exactly; do not add borders to the following process panel unless source shows them
preserve process media carousel and FAQ row stack; avoid invented borders in the How it works/process section

anatomy: crop component content on true component boundaries
componentContracts.rule: sticky headers should not repeat in non-header source or skeleton rows, and source components should not be split half in one row and half in another
preserve product carousel, yellow review header, summary rating, and search control
preserve review entry rhythm and image rows across the scroll
preserve yellow CTA/footer layout instead of generic media block
